brainstorm_ui.fires_when: phase has UI plan and CONTEXT.md lacks Design alternatives section

brainstorm_architecture.fires_when: phase introduces new service/model/integration/data shape and CONTEXT.md or RESEARCH.md lacks Architecture alternatives section

design_shotgun.fires_when: phase has UI plan and no UI-SPEC.md exists for the surface

design_critique.fires_when: UI plan has UI-SPEC.md before implementation, OR as filter step in design-shotgun

strengthened_by.fires_when: task introduces a new TypeScript module's public API surface in a TS-primary project

ui_preview.fires_when: task modifies a frontend component, route, or visual surface

verification.fires_when: always — before any task transitions to complete

spec_review.fires_when: always — after all tasks complete, before phase verification

code_review.fires_when: always — after spec_review, in independent agent context

security.fires_when: diff touches auth, storage, request handling, secrets, LLM trust boundaries

qa.fires_when: phase ships user-visible behavior AND dev server reachable on local port

impeccable_audit.fires_when: diff modifies visual surface of shipping UI

db_pre_launch_audit.fires_when: before first production launch, after major DB migration
